+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-3224677912.png){width="75"} | e + geom_text(aes(label = cty), nudge_x = 1, nudge_y = 1)                                 | **Draw labels on the plot.**                                                                                       |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, y, label, alpha, angle, color, family, fontface, hjust, lineheight, size, vjust*                               |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **One Discrete, One Continuous**                                                      | ![](images/clipboard-1986318263.png){width="75"} | f + geom_col()                                                                            | **Draw barplot where bar height is equal to value in data**                                                        |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
| f \<- ggplot(mpg, aes(class, hwy))                                                    |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, y, alpha, color, fill, group, linetype, size*                                                                  |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-2864893630.png){width="75"} | f + geom_boxplot()                                                                        | **Draw a boxplot.**                                                                                                |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, y, lower, middle, upper, ymax, ymin, alpha, color, fill, group, linetype, shape, size, weight*                 |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-47994042.png){width="75"}   | f + geom_dotplot(binaxis = "y", stackdir = “center")                                      | **Draw a dotplot of distribution, similar to box plot or violin plot but each data points are visualized on plot** |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, y, alpha, color, fill, group*                                                                                  |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-1084807696.png){width="75"} | f + geom_violin(scale = “area")                                                           | **Draws a violin plot.**                                                                                           |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, y, alpha, color, fill, group, linetype, size, weight*                                                          |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Both** **Discrete**                                                                 | ![](images/clipboard-1204122064.png){width="75"} | g + geom_count()                                                                          | **Counts Plot**                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
| g \<- ggplot(diamonds, aes(cut, color))                                               |                                                  |                                                                                           | x, y, alpha, color, fill, shape, size, stroke                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-3228270498.png){width="75"} | e + geom_jitter(height = 2, width = 2)                                                    | **Adds Jitter to Point Plot**                                                                                      |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | x, y, alpha, color, fill, shape, size                                                                              |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Continuous Bivariate Distribution**                                                 | ![](images/clipboard-3223192822.png){width="75"} | h + geom_bin2d(binwidth = c(0.25, 500))                                                   | **Heatmap**                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
| h \<- ggplot(diamonds, aes(carat, price))                                             |                                                  |                                                                                           | x, y, alpha, color, fill, linetype, size, weight                                                                   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-1611589375.png){width="75"} | h + geom_density_2d()                                                                     | **2D Density Plot**                                                                                                |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | x, y, alpha, color, group, linetype, size                                                                          |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-4160595462.png){width="75"} | h + geom_hex()                                                                            | **Hex Plot**                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | x, y, alpha, color, fill, size                                                                                     |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Continuous Function**                                                               | ![](images/clipboard-1056385364.png){width="75"} | i + geom_area()                                                                           | **Area Plot**                                                                                                      |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
| i \<- ggplot(economics, aes(date, unemploy))                                          |                                                  |                                                                                           | x, y, alpha, color, fill, linetype, size                                                                           |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-953240505.png){width="75"}  | i + geom_line()                                                                           | **Line Plot**                                                                                                      |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | x, y, alpha, color, group, linetype, size                                                                          |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-949273935.png){width="75"}  | i + geom_step(direction = "hv")                                                           | **Step Plot**                                                                                                      |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | x, y, alpha, color, group, linetype, size                                                                          |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Visualizing Error**                                                                 | ![](images/clipboard-2312910950.png){width="75"} | j + geom_crossbar(fatten = 2)                                                             | **Cross Bars**                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
| df \<- data.frame(grp = c("A", "B"), fit = 4:5, se = 1:2)                             |                                                  |                                                                                           | x, y, ymax, ymin, alpha, color, fill, group, linetype, size                                                        |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
| j \<- ggplot(df, aes(grp, fit, ymin=fit-se, ymax=fit+se))                             |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-3254909633.png){width="75"} | j + geom_errorbar()                                                                       | **Error Bars**                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, ymax, ymin, alpha, color, group, linetype, size, width* Also **geom_errorbarh().**                             |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-2980467943.png){width="75"} | j + geom_linerange()                                                                      | **Line Range**                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | x, ymin, ymax, alpha, color, group, linetype, size                                                                 |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-2793617127.png){width="75"} | j + geom_pointrange()                                                                     | **Point Range**                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, y, ymin, ymax, alpha, color, fill, group, linetype, shape, size*                                               |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Maps**                                                                              | ![](images/clipboard-1180856295.png){width="75"} | k + geom_map(aes(map_id = state), map = map) + expand_limits(x = map\$long, y = map\$lat) | **Choropleth Plot**                                                                                                |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
| data \<- data.frame(murder = USArrests\$Murder, state = tolower(rownames(USArrests))) |                                                  |                                                                                           | *map_id, alpha, color, fill, linetype, size*                                                                       |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
| map \<- map_data("state") k \<- ggplot(data, aes(fill = murder))                      |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Three Variables**                                                                   | ![](images/clipboard-3435924015.png){width="75"} | l + geom_contour(aes(z = z))                                                              | **Draws 3D in 2D**                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
| seals\$z \<- with(seals, sqrt(delta_long\^2 + delta_lat\^2))                          |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, y, z, alpha, color, group, linetype, size, weight*                                                             |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
| l \<- ggplot(seals, aes(long, lat))                                                   |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-4189538920.png){width="75"} | l + geom_contour_filled(aes(fill = z))                                                    | **Draws 3D in 2D**                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, y, alpha, color, fill, group, linetype, size, subgroup*                                                        |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-1528851112.png){width="75"} | l + geom_raster(aes(fill = z), hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5, interpolate = FALSE)             | **Raster plot - high performance**                                                                                 |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, y, alpha, fill*                                                                                                |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                                       | ![](images/clipboard-1327384910.png){width="75"} | l + geom_tile(aes(fill = z))                                                              | **Same as geom_rect()**                                                                                            |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                       |                                                  |                                                                                           | *x, y, alpha, color, fill, linetype, size, width*                                                                  |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Basic Chart Types

### Bar Chart: geom_bar()

If we wanted a bar plot of the numbers of individuals and stages in the dataset by gender.

```{r}
ggplot(clinical_clean, aes(demographic.gender, fill=simplified_stage))+geom_bar()
```

We can plot the number of individuals for each stage

```{r}
ggplot(clinical_clean, aes(x=simplified_stage))+geom_bar()
```

If you want them separated out by gender, we need to pass an argument to the `geom_bar(position='dodge')` or `geom_bar(position='dodge2')`

```{r}
ggplot(clinical_clean, aes(x=simplified_stage, fill=demographic.gender))+geom_bar(position='dodge')
```

Because the Clinical dataset isn't the greatest for many different plot types, we'll use a few different datasets to demonstrate some of the other plot types.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Line Plot: geom_line()

```{r}
economics
```

```{r}
ggplot(economics, aes(date, unemploy))+geom_line()
```

```{r}
penguins = read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mwaskom/seaborn-data/master/penguins.csv")
head(penguins)
```

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, mapping=aes(x=flipper_length_mm, y=body_mass_g, color=species)) + geom_point(shape=0)
```

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(x=species, y=body_mass_g, color=species)) + 
  geom_violin() + geom_boxplot(width=0.1)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Scatter Plot: geom_point()

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(flipper_length_mm, body_mass_g)) + geom_point()
```

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(flipper_length_mm, body_mass_g, color=species)) + geom_point()
```

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(flipper_length_mm, body_mass_g, group=species)) + geom_point(aes(color = species)) + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, aes(color = species))
```

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(flipper_length_mm, body_mass_g, group=species, color=species)) + geom_point() + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Histogram

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(body_mass_g)) + geom_histogram()
```

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(body_mass_g)) + geom_histogram(aes(fill=species), alpha=0.5 , position = "identity")
```

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(body_mass_g)) + geom_density(aes(fill=species), alpha=0.5 , position = "identity")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Box Plot

```{r}
ggplot(penguins,aes(species,body_mass_g)) + geom_boxplot()
```

```{r}
ggplot(penguins,aes(species,body_mass_g, color=species)) + geom_boxplot()
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Violin Plot

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(species, body_mass_g)) + geom_violin()
```

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(species, body_mass_g)) + geom_violin() + geom_boxplot(width=0.2)
```

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(species, body_mass_g, color=island)) + geom_violin()+ geom_boxplot(width=0.2)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Level 4 (Facets): Add Subplots based on values (Optional)

If you have categorical variables, it's easy to define multiple subplots that based on the number of categories. Facets will create a subplot for each category.

There are two different types of **facets**

1.  facet_grid()
2.  facet_wrap()

### facet_grid(rows\~columns)

**facet_grid()** allows you to define a grid of subplots (rows and columns) you want to by categories of the defined rows. For the penguins dataset we can plot rows for each *species* and columns for each *island*

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(x=flipper_length_mm, y=body_mass_g)) + geom_point() + facet_grid(species~island)
```

If you only want to plot a single category as a row by species, then you can just define the **column** value as a period (.)

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, mapping=aes(x=flipper_length_mm, y=body_mass_g)) + geom_point() + facet_grid(species~.)
```

Alternatively, if you just want as a single column, define the **rows** as a period (.)

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, mapping=aes(x=flipper_length_mm, y=body_mass_g)) + geom_point() + facet_grid(.~species)
```

### facet_wrap(\~columns)

**facet_wrap()** will wrap the subplots into a rectangular layout.

#### Syntax:

```         
facet_wrap(
  facets,
  nrow = NULL,
  ncol = NULL,
  scales = "fixed",
  shrink = TRUE,
  labeller = "label_value",
  as.table = TRUE,
  switch = deprecated(),
  drop = TRUE,
  dir = "h",
  strip.position = "top",
  axes = "margins",
  axis.labels = "all"
)
```

We can leave the number of rows and columns up to the defaults in **facet_wrap()**

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, aes(x=flipper_length_mm, y=body_mass_g)) + geom_point() + facet_wrap(~species)
```

If we want the plot have a specific number of rows and colums, we can define the `nrow`, and/or `ncol` arguments.

```{r}
ggplot(penguins, mapping=aes(x=flipper_length_mm, y=body_mass_g)) + geom_point() + facet_wrap(~species, nrow=2)
```

# Labels & Legends

You can adjust the labels of your plot using `labs()`

+-----------------+-------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| Label Arguments | Description                   | Example                                      |
+=================+===============================+==============================================+
| x               | x-axis label                  | labs(x="Flipper Length (mm)")                |
+-----------------+-------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| y               | y-axis label                  | labs(y="Body Mass (g)")                      |
+-----------------+-------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| title           | Plot Title above the plot     | labs(title="Palmer Penguins")                |
+-----------------+-------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| subtitle        | Plot subtitle below the title | labs(subtitle="Flipper Length vs Body Mass") |
+-----------------+-------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| caption         | Caption below the plot        | labs(caption="Figure 1")                     |
+-----------------+-------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| alt             | Alternative text              | labs(alt="Alternative Text")                 |
+-----------------+-------------------------------+----------------------------------------------+

```{r}
(gg = ggplot(penguins,aes(species,body_mass_g, color=species)) + geom_boxplot())
```

```{r}
gg + labs(x="Species", y="Body Mass (g)", title="Palmer's Penguins", subtitle="Distribution by Species", 
     caption="Figure 1", alt="Alternative Text")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Themes

Themes provide the ability to change characteristics of the plot theme (ie background colors, tick marks, fonts, font size). ggplot2 has a few 8 built-in themes. <https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/ggtheme.html>

To explore many more predefined themes, check out: <https://exts.ggplot2.tidyverse.org/ggthemes.html> or <https://github.com/hrbrmstr/hrbrthemes>

```{r}
ggplot(penguins,aes(species,body_mass_g, color=species)) + geom_boxplot() + 
  labs(x="Species", y="Body Mass (g)", title="Palmer's Penguins", subtitle="Distribution by Species", caption="Figure 1", alt="Alternative Text") + theme_light()
```

# Additional ggplot2 Extensions

<https://exts.ggplot2.tidyverse.org/gallery/>

```{r}
library(ggstatsplot)
ggscatterstats(
  data = penguins, ## data frame from which variables are taken
  x = flipper_length_mm, ## predictor/independent variable
  y = body_mass_g, ## dependent variable
  xlab = "Flipper Length (mm)", ## label for the x-axis
  ylab = "Body Mass (g)", ## label for the y-axis
  xfill = "#CC79A7", ## fill for marginals on the x-axis
  yfill = "#009E73", ## fill for marginals on the y-axis
  title = "Relationship between Flipper Length and Body Mass"
)
```
